examples: This, IMHO, is smart and helps us out, too.
IMHO that is just not the smartest or most profitable approach.
Genender: Well I think there are huge motives, IMHO [in my humble opinion].
That is a powerless position and we fail to make our unique contribution to the world, IMHO.
Apple has finally delivered that with the announcement of iCloud, a bit late IMHO, but still very welcome news.
